The '''B2 battle droid dispenser''', also known as the '''super battle droid dispenser''' was a cylindrical [[droid dispenser]] used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The device continually dispensed a supply of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] from four large hatches mounted at equidistant points. The device was resistant to [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolts, but could be destroyed using a [[detonation pack]]. Equipped with a propulsion function, the devices could be launched onto [[Starship/Legends|ships]] by [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk-class'' droid control ships]]. [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]], an elite [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] for the Republic, encountered many of these units during their various operations including the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], [[Attack on the Prosecutor]], and [[Mission to Kashyyyk (Clone Wars)|Mission to Kashyyyk]]. During the Attack on the ''[[Prosecutor]]'' [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|acclamator-class assault ship]], [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] working under the Confederacy took use the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] dispensers to attempt to kill Delta Squad.<ref name="Commando" />

==Behind the scenes==
B2 battle droid dispensers appeared in the<ref name="Commando" /> [[2005]]<ref name="OutNow">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/videogames/news/news20050301.html|text=''Star Wars'' Republic Commando: Out Now!}}</ref> [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]],'' developed by [[LucasArts]].<ref name="Commando" /> Prior to the game's release, the device was mentioned on LucasArts.com's ''Star Wars: Republic Commando'' page.<ref name="LucasArts.com">{{LucasArts|url=games/swrepubliccommando/hud.html|text=''Star Wars Republic Commando''}}</ref> In the game, droid dispensers will continue deploying droids until the dispenser itself is destroyed.<ref name="Commando" /> It is likely that this is simply game mechanics.
